description: Unified design token scale display. Renders shadows, radii, borders, colors, or sizes based on the type attribute.

attributes.name: tokens
attributes.description: Comma-separated token names (for icon type: comma-separated icon names). Defaults vary by type

attributes.name: prefix
attributes.description: CSS variable prefix (auto-set from type if omitted; ignored for icon type)

attributes.name: show-values
attributes.description: Show computed token values (for icon type: show icon name labels)

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Icon size (icon type only): xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl

attributes.name: icon-set
attributes.description: Icon set (icon type only): lucide, phosphor, tabler, etc. Defaults to icon-wc's default

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Turn value cells into inputs that write the token on the target scope. Ignored for icon type.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: CSS selector for the element to receive token overrides (default: ":root"). Only used when editable.
